opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I cannot swallow anything, not even a sip of water or my own spit; it just hits a wall in my chest and comes straight back up smelling awful.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting harder to swallow for months, but in the last 12 hours I can't get anything down at all — even my own saliva comes back up.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 5 months ago it slowly started getting harder to swallow; over the last 12 hours I can't swallow anything at all
symptom_narrative.duration: 5 months, and completely blocked for the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: food and drink hit a wall behind my breastbone and come straight back up; now even water and my own saliva won't go down and come back up smelling foul
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — I can't keep anything down, not even spit
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the middle of my chest, behind the breastbone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it started only with dry solid food, then soft food, then liquids, and now it's constant and total
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — I just have to keep spitting my saliva into a bowl
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to swallow makes it come straight back up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: swallowing hurts, there's a constant pressure behind my breastbone, I keep coughing, and my voice has gone hoarse
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had bad heartburn and reflux for years
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't eat or drink anything, I feel drained and exhausted

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing severe acid reflux and heartburn

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home; became completely unable to swallow over the last 12 hours

objective_data_offered.value: I've lost about 15 kg over the last few months without trying
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate, not a measured serial weight

objective_data_offered.value: looks thin and frail, sitting leaning over a bowl and repeatedly spitting out saliva, appears exhausted
voice sounds hoarse and there is a frequent cough
everything I try to swallow, including water and saliva, comes back up as foul-smelling fluid within seconds
